    fix(server): canonicalize Run layering — bundles → try, sessions → run [ddx-65543530]
    
    Bundles in .ddx/executions/ represent execute-bead attempts (try layer);
    AgentSession entries represent individual agent invocations (run layer).
    Previously bundles were synthesized as run-layer Runs and sessions were
    not projected onto Runs at all, conflating the two layers.
    
    state_runs.go:
    - executionBundleToRun now emits RunLayerTry, populating baseRevision,
      resultRevision, and mergeOutcome (derived from verdict + resultRev).
    - Add synthesizeRunsFromSessions to project SessionIndexEntry rows onto
      RunLayerRun records — harness/provider/model/tokens/cost/duration map
      losslessly; sessions whose BundlePath points at a bundle are parented
      to the matching exec-<id> try.
    - loadRunsForProject merges sessions alongside bundles, dedup by id.
    
    state_runs_test.go: layering correctness — bundle yields layer=try with
    revs and merge outcome, bundle-linked session yields layer=run parented
    to the try, orphan session yields layer=run with no parent.
